tiktok.caption: 42% of people never open their bills. Here's what that habit is actually costing you 👀

youtube_short.title: Not Opening Your Bills Costs $24,000
title_alternatives: Financial Avoidance Has a Shocking Price Tag
youtube_short.description: 42% of Americans avoid their financial statements — and it's not just a bad habit, it's costing them $24,000 over a decade. Between late fees, missed fraud, uncaught billing errors (80% of medical bills have mistakes), and IRS penalties up to 25%, the price tag adds up fast. The fix is just 10 minutes once a month. #personalfinance #moneytips #financialfreedom #savemoney #financialliteracy

hook_line: 42% of people never open their bills — here's the $24K price tag
